prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021年物理类最低位次约7981名，2025年约18711名，四年间位次大幅后移约10730名，显示该校在辽宁省的报考热度持续下降，竞争明显减弱；2025年基准位次约18711名；2021-2025年物理类招生计划均为18人，2026年招生计划仍为18人，计划人数连续多年持平，对竞争格局无显著影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 海军军医大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，位于上海市，是军队系统重点医科大学；软科中国大学排名未进入前200名，整体层次处于211中游水平；抖音平台综合热度排名第9，评价为"高热"，短视频曝光量高，反映该校在考生群体中关注度较高；声誉评价文件中无该校负面舆情记录，投档异常文件中亦无该校断档记录，整体声誉平稳正面；第五轮学科；但作为军队重点医科大学，临床医学、药学等专业具有传统优势。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业热度持续高位（2023年高热推荐，2024年推荐），麻醉学、医学影像学等医学类专业社会需求稳定；护理学专业热度升温（2024年推荐），就业前景良好；辽宁省2026年高考总报名约200000人，按近年物理类占比约71.5%估算约143000人，与2025年物理类143368人基本持平，考生规模未出现明显波动；省控线本科批近五年稳定在336-368分区间，特控线在494-515分区间，整体平稳；该校位于上海市，对辽宁考生属于跨省报考，地域偏好上上海作为一线城市具有一定吸引力；但军事类院校的特殊性质（无军籍地方生、政治面貌要求等）可能对部分考生形成门槛。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次大幅后移趋势（2021→2025后移约10730名）、招生计划连续持平、考生规模基本稳定、抖音热度高但无负面舆情等因素，预计2026年该校在辽宁省物理类的最低录取位次将继续小幅后移，竞争热度略有下降。预测最低位次约18911名，区间18411-19411名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间18411-19411名内，建议以二档专业（临床医学、药学）为主攻方向，一档专业（麻醉学、医学影像学）作为冲刺，三档专业（生物技术、护理学）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（18411名以内）可重点冲刺一档专业；位次接近区间上限（19411名附近）应以三档保底为主。注意该校无军籍地方生仅招收普通高中应届毕业生，政治面貌须为共青团员或中共党员，特控线上录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 7981, and in 2025 it was approximately 18711, with a significant backward shift of about 10730 positions over four years, indicating a continuous decline in the university's application popularity in Liaoning Province and a marked weakening of competition; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 18711; the enrollment plan for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 was 18 students each year, and the 2026 enrollment plan remains 18 students, with the number of planned students remaining unchanged for many consecutive years, having no significant impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Naval Medical University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, located in Shanghai, and is a key medical university under the military system; it is not ranked in the top 200 in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, placing it at the mid-level among 211 universities; it ranks 9th in comprehensive popularity on the Douyin platform, rated as 'high heat', with high short video exposure, reflecting high attention among candidates; there are no negative public opinion records of the university in the reputation evaluation documents, and no records of enrollment gaps in the abnormal submission files, indicating a stable and positive overall reputation; fifth round of discipline evaluation; but as a key military medical university, it has traditional advantages in clinical medicine, pharmacy, and other majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of clinical medicine remains consistently high (highly recommended in 2023, recommended in 2024), and anesthesiology, medical imaging, and other medical majors have stable social demand; nursing major popularity is heating up (recommended in 2024), with good employment prospects; the total number of candidates registered for the 2026 Liaoning Province college entrance examination is approximately 200,000, with an estimated 143,000 in the Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 71.5%, which is basically the same as the 143,368 in 2025, showing no significant fluctuation in the candidate pool; the provincial control line for the undergraduate batch has been stable in the range of 336-368 points over the past five years, and the special control line in the range of 494-515 points, overall stable; the university is located in Shanghai, which is a cross-province application for Liaoning candidates, and Shanghai as a first-tier city has a certain appeal in terms of regional preference; however, the special nature of military academies (non-military local students, political status requirements, etc.) may create barriers for some candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend in historical rankings (shifted back by about 10,730 positions from 2021 to 2025), the continuous flat enrollment plan, the basically stable candidate pool, high Douyin popularity but no negative public opinion, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for the university in the Physics Category of Liaoning Province in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward, with a slight decrease in competition heat. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 18911, with a range of 18411-19411.

- Pharmacy (Non-military Local Students).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 18411-19411, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Clinical Medicine, Pharmacy) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Anesthesiology, Medical Imaging) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Biotechnology, Nursing) as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 18411), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 19411), mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Note that the university's non-military local students only recruit ordinary high school fresh graduates, and the political status must be Communist Youth League member or Communist Party member, admitted above the special control line.
